clauses.auto_action_min_conf: Do not auto-action a target whose track confidence is below 0.7.
clauses.escalate_if_tracks_per_asset_gt: If more than 10 tracks converge on a single protected asset, escalate to a human operator.
clauses.proximity_under_50m: Any track with nearest_asset_m < 50 is priority 1 by default.
